metadata.name: sss_token
metadata.description: SSS Token: Solana Stablecoin Standard — Configurable stablecoin program with SSS-1/SSS-2 presets

instructions.name: accept_authority
docs: Accept a pending authority nomination (two-step transfer, step 2).
Caller must be the nominated pending authority.

instructions.name: add_to_allowlist
docs: Add an address to the allowlist. Caller must be master authority.
SSS-3 only — allowlist restricts transfers to pre-approved addresses.

instructions.name: add_to_blacklist
docs: Add an address to the blacklist. Caller must have blacklister role.
Fails gracefully if compliance was not enabled during initialization.

accounts.name: role_assignment
docs: Optional role assignment (not needed if caller is master authority)

instructions.name: assign_role
docs: Add or update a role assignment. Caller must be master authority.

accounts.name: minter_info
docs: Optional: minter info (only needed when assigning minter role)

instructions.name: burn_tokens
docs: Burn tokens from the caller's account. Caller must have burner role.

accounts.name: burn_from
docs: Token account to burn from (must be owned by burner)

instructions.name: freeze_account
docs: Freeze a token account. Caller must have master or pauser role.

accounts.name: role_assignment
docs: Optional role assignment (not needed if caller is master authority)

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize a new stablecoin with the given configuration.
Supports SSS-1 (minimal) and SSS-2 (compliant) presets, or custom configs.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The mint account to create (Token-2022). Must be a fresh keypair.

accounts.name: stablecoin
docs: Stablecoin config PDA

accounts.name: transfer_hook_program
docs: Optional: transfer hook program for SSS-2

instructions.name: mint_tokens
docs: Mint tokens to a recipient. Caller must have minter role.

accounts.name: role_assignment
docs: Minter's role assignment PDA

accounts.name: minter_info
docs: Minter quota tracking

accounts.name: recipient_token_account
docs: Recipient's token account

instructions.name: nominate_authority
docs: Nominate a new master authority (two-step transfer, step 1).
The new authority must call accept_authority to complete the transfer.
This prevents accidental loss of authority from typos.

instructions.name: pause
docs: Pause all token operations. Caller must have pauser role.

instructions.name: remove_from_allowlist_entry
docs: Remove an address from the allowlist. Caller must be master authority.

instructions.name: remove_from_blacklist
docs: Remove an address from the blacklist. Caller must have blacklister role.

accounts.name: role_assignment
docs: Optional role assignment (not needed if caller is master authority)

instructions.name: revoke_role
docs: Revoke a role assignment. Caller must be master authority.

instructions.name: seize
docs: Seize tokens from a frozen/blacklisted account via permanent delegate.
Caller must have seizer role. SSS-2 only.

accounts.name: role_assignment
docs: Optional role assignment (not needed if caller is master authority)

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: Blacklist entry must exist and be active — proves the target is blacklisted

accounts.name: source_account
docs: Source token account (blacklisted address)

accounts.name: treasury_account
docs: Treasury token account to receive seized tokens

instructions.name: set_supply_cap
docs: Set or update the supply cap. Only master authority. Set to 0 to remove cap.

instructions.name: thaw_account
docs: Thaw a frozen token account. Caller must have master or pauser role.

instructions.name: transfer_authority
docs: Direct transfer of master authority (single-step, use with caution).
Prefer nominate_authority + accept_authority for safety.

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Unpause token operations. Caller must have pauser role.

instructions.name: update_minter_quota
docs: Update minter quota. Caller must be master authority.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller does not have the required role

errors.name: ComplianceNotEnabled
errors.msg: Compliance module not enabled for this stablecoin

errors.name: InvalidDecimals
errors.msg: Invalid decimals: must be between 0 and 18

errors.name: TransferHookNotEnabled
errors.msg: Transfer hook not enabled for this stablecoin

errors.name: SeizeRequiresBlacklist
errors.msg: Cannot seize from a non-blacklisted account

errors.name: NotPendingAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the nominated pending authority

errors.name: AllowlistNotEnabled
errors.msg: Allowlist is not enabled for this stablecoin

errors.name: NotAllowlisted
errors.msg: Address is not on the allowlist

types.name: AllowlistEntry
docs: Allowlist entry for SSS-3 privacy-preserving compliance.
Seeds: ["allowlist", stablecoin_pubkey, address_pubkey]

types.name: BlacklistEntry
docs: Blacklist entry for SSS-2 compliance.
Seeds: ["blacklist", stablecoin_pubkey, address_pubkey]
Entries are never deleted — they are deactivated to preserve the audit trail.

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this entry is currently active

types.name: MinterInfo
docs: Per-minter info (tracks quota usage).
Seeds: ["minter_info", stablecoin_pubkey, minter_pubkey]

fields.name: quota
docs: Maximum amount this minter can mint (0 = unlimited)

fields.name: minted
docs: Amount already minted by this minter

types.name: Role
docs: Roles in the stablecoin system.
No single key controls everything — separation of concerns.

types.name: RoleAssignment
docs: Role assignment account.
Seeds: ["role", stablecoin_pubkey, role_type_bytes, assignee_pubkey]

fields.name: stablecoin
docs: The stablecoin this role belongs to

fields.name: role
docs: The role type

fields.name: assignee
docs: Who holds the role

fields.name: active
docs: Whether the role is active

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

types.name: Stablecoin
docs: Core stablecoin configuration account.
Seeds: ["stablecoin", mint_pubkey]

fields.name: authority
docs: Master authority — can assign/revoke all roles

fields.name: mint
docs: Token mint address (Token-2022)

fields.name: name
docs: Stablecoin name

fields.name: symbol
docs: Stablecoin symbol

fields.name: uri
docs: Metadata URI

fields.name: decimals
docs: Token decimals

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether the token is paused

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: SSS-2: permanent delegate enabled

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: SSS-2: transfer hook enabled

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: SSS-2: whether new accounts start frozen (default_account_frozen)

fields.name: enable_allowlist
docs: SSS-3: allowlist enabled (restricts transfers to pre-approved addresses)

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Total minted supply tracked on-chain

fields.name: total_burned
docs: Total burned tracked on-chain

fields.name: supply_cap
docs: Maximum supply cap (0 = unlimited)

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Pending authority for two-step transfer (Pubkey::default() = none)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved for future upgrades

types.name: StablecoinInitConfig
docs: Configuration passed during initialization.

fields.name: enable_permanent_delegate
docs: SSS-2: enable permanent delegate for token seizure

fields.name: enable_transfer_hook
docs: SSS-2: enable transfer hook for blacklist enforcement

fields.name: default_account_frozen
docs: SSS-2: new accounts start frozen until explicitly thawed

fields.name: enable_allowlist
docs: SSS-3: enable allowlist (restricts transfers to pre-approved addresses)

fields.name: supply_cap
docs: Optional supply cap (None or 0 = unlimited)
